x-kubernetes-validations.message: scalingModifiers must not be set; WVA controls the scaling metric formula and logic
horizontalPodAutoscalerConfig.name must not be set; the controller manages the HPA name
hpa and keda are mutually exclusive; choose one actuator backend
either hpa or keda must be specified as the actuator backend
wva is required when scaling is configured; it provides the autoscaling mechanism
minReplicas cannot exceed maxReplicas

idleReplicaCount must be less than minReplicas; idleReplicaCount defines the replica floor when no triggers are active
replicas and scaling are mutually exclusive; use scaling for autoscaled deployments or replicas for static deployments

value must be an absolute path and start with '/' when type one of ['Exact', 'PathPrefix']
must not contain '//' when type one of ['Exact', 'PathPrefix']

must not contain '/../' when type one of ['Exact', 'PathPrefix']
must not contain '%2f' when type one of ['Exact', 'PathPrefix']

type must be one of ['Exact', 'PathPrefix', 'RegularExpression']
must only contain valid characters (matching ^(?:[-A-Za-z0-9/._~!$&'()*+,;=:@]|[%][0-9a-fA-F]{2})+$) for types ['Exact', 'PathPrefix']
